name: security-audit
description: Full security review of a codebase. Map the attack surface, harden vulnerabilities, review critical code paths, and produce an audit report with remediation checklist.

config.instruction: Map the codebase with focus on security-relevant surfaces: auth endpoints, data input points, file handling, external API calls, database queries, secrets in code.
Full security hardening pass: OWASP Top 10, injection, XSS, CSRF, auth bypass, insecure deserialization, secrets exposure, dependency vulnerabilities. Fix what you can, flag what needs human review.
Security-focused code review: auth flows, permission checks, input validation, output encoding, crypto usage, error handling that leaks info. Rate each finding by severity.
Produce the security audit report: findings by severity (critical/high/medium/low), remediation steps for each, compliance checklist (SOC2/GDPR/PCI relevant items), and a prioritized fix plan.
